'''âdh-t-n-s''' ('''kadhatnesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wakeboard|wakeboard]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-t-n-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wakeboard|wakeboard]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âdh-t-n-s
|-
! Lemma
| kadhatnesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhatnesoko|thidhatnesoko]] || [[word:jidhatnesoko|jidhatnesoko]] || [[word:shidhatnesoko|shidhatnesoko]] || [[word:kidhatnesoko|kidhatnesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhatnesoko|thuthudhatnesoko]] || [[word:jujudhatnesoko|jujudhatnesoko]] || [[word:shushudhatnesoko|shushudhatnesoko]] || [[word:kukudhatnesoko|kukudhatnesoko]]
|-

|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhatnesoko|thudhatnesoko]] || [[word:judhatnesoko|judhatnesoko]] || [[word:shudhatnesoko|shudhatnesoko]] || [[word:kudhatnesoko|kudhatnesoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhatnesoko|thodhatnesoko]] || [[word:jodhatnesoko|jodhatnesoko]] || [[word:shodhatnesoko|shodhatnesoko]] || [[word:kodhatnesoko|kodhatnesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdhatnesoko|thĂŠdhatnesoko]] || [[word:jĂŠdhatnesoko|jĂŠdhatnesoko]] || [[word:shĂŠdhatnesoko|shĂŠdhatnesoko]] || [[word:kĂŠdhatnesoko|kĂŠdhatnesoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhatnesoko|thadhatnesoko]] || [[word:jadhatnesoko|jadhatnesoko]] || [[word:shadhatnesoko|shadhatnesoko]] || [[word:kadhatnesoko|kadhatnesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhatnesoko|thadhatnesoko]] || [[word:jadhatnesoko|jadhatnesoko]] || [[word:shadhatnesoko|shadhatnesoko]] || [[word:kadhatnesoko|kadhatnesoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
